steps.description: Click the "Declarative Agent" option in the "New Project" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Create a declarative agent with an action" option in the dropdown under “Add an action to your declarative agent” within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Start with a New API" option in the action type dropdown menu within the "Create an Action" dialog of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code.

Click the text input field in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to select the default folder path "/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects" in the Visual Studio Code interface for Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit setup.
Click the "appPack" folder in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code to expand or select it.
@assertion there are three JSON schema files in the folder appPackage
